title: Was Mrs. Rumbold a good companion at dinner?

meanings.usage: 指聚会或晚宴上的女性主持人
指一起吃饭或活动的人
常与on连用，表示盯着某物
指在国外，常与go, be连用
指椅子或可以坐的地方
用作称呼时带轻微不敬含义
be busy doing something 表示忙于做某事
引导宾语从句，表示是否

examples.en: The teacher asked me to sit next to Tom.
examples.zh: 老师让我坐在汤姆旁边。

examples.en: I took my seat beside the window.
He tried to make conversation with the stranger.
examples.zh: 他试图和那个陌生人攀谈。

examples.en: A new film is coming to our cinema next week.
examples.zh: 一部新电影下周将在我们电影院上映。

examples.en: We are going to see a play tonight.
Many people spend holidays abroad in summer.
examples.zh: 很多人在夏天去国外度假。

examples.en: Will you stay in China for the holiday?
In despair, he gave up trying.
We all enjoyed our dinner very much.
examples.zh: 我们都很享受这顿晚餐。

examples.en: If you eat more and talk less, you will be healthier.
examples.zh: 如果你多吃少说，你会更健康。

grammar.title: 将来进行时 (Future Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在将来某一时刻或时间段正在进行的动作，常用于询问或谈论已安排好的计划。
grammar.usage: 用来询问他人在特定时间的安排，含有礼貌询问的意味

examples.en: Will you be seeing the new play?
Will you be spending your holidays abroad?
Will you be staying in England?

grammar.title: 虚拟语气 (第二类条件句)
grammar.definition: 用来描述与现在事实相反或不太可能实现的假设情况。
grammar.structure: If + 主语 + 过去式 (be用were), 主语 + would/could + 动词原形
grammar.usage: 用于提出建议、想象不可能发生的情况或礼貌请求

examples.en: If you ate more and talked less, we would both enjoy our dinner.
examples.zh: 如果你多吃少说，我们俩都会享受晚餐的。

examples.en: If I were you, I would study harder.
examples.zh: 如果我是你，我会更努力学习。

examples.en: If it rained, we would stay at home.
examples.zh: 如果下雨，我们会待在家里。

grammar.title: 间接疑问句 (Indirect Questions)
grammar.definition: 当把一个疑问句变成从句时，词序要变成陈述句的词序。
grammar.usage: 用于转述问题，使语言更加正式

examples.en: I asked her whether she was enjoying her dinner.
examples.zh: 我问她晚餐是否吃得开心。

examples.en: She asked me if I could help her.
I wondered whether he would come.

imitations.en: Will you be attending the meeting tomorrow?
Will you be working late tonight?
imitations.zh: 你今晚会工作到很晚吗？

sentencePatterns.pattern: If + 主语 + 过去式..., 主语 + would + 动词原形...

original.en: If you ate more and talked less, we would both enjoy our dinner!
original.zh: 如果你多吃少说，我们俩都会享受晚餐！

imitations.en: If you studied harder, you would pass the exam.
imitations.zh: 如果你更努力学习，你就会通过考试。

imitations.en: If it were sunny, we would go to the beach.
imitations.zh: 如果天气好，我们就去海滩。

original.en: Was Mrs. Rumbold a good companion at dinner?
original.zh: 朗伯德夫人是晚餐的好同伴吗？

sentencePatterns.pattern: I asked + whether/if + 主语 + 动词...

original.en: In despair, I asked her whether she was enjoying her dinner.
original.zh: 绝望中，我问她晚餐是否吃得开心。

imitations.en: I asked whether he needed help.
She asked if I could speak English.
